name: Tabouleh (Burghul and Parsley Salad)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place burghul in a bowl and cover with cold water. Leave to soak for 30 minutes.
2. Drain the burghul through a fine sieve, pressing gently with the back of a spoon to extract moisture. Spread onto a cloth and leave to dry further.
3. Meanwhile, prepare parsley by washing well, shaking off excess moisture, and removing thick stalks. Wrap in a tea towel and place in refrigerator to crisp and dry.
4. Add spring onions to the burghul and gently squeeze the mixture so that the burghul absorbs the onion flavor.
5. Chop the parsley coarsely and add it with mint to the burghul.
6. In a separate bowl, beat olive oil with lemon juice and stir in salt and pepper. Add this dressing to the salad and toss well.
7. Peel and seed the tomatoes, then cut into dice. Gently stir the diced tomatoes into the salad.
8. Cover the salad and chill for at least 1 hour before serving.
9. Serve in a salad bowl lined with crisp lettuce leaves. The lemon juice and salt mixture may be added according to individual taste. Serves 6-8.
